mapper.insert: insert into aiw_scheduled_task_execution (biz_id, task_code, task_type, trigger_source, status, event_id, result_summary, failure_reason, started_at, completed_at, created_at) values (#{bizId}, #{taskCode}, #{taskType}, #{triggerSource}, #{status}, #{eventId}, #{resultSummary}, #{failureReason}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{createdAt}) on duplicate key update status = values(status), result_summary = values(result_summary), failure_reason = values(failure_reason), completed_at = values(completed_at)
